fallback.note: All 6 recoveries used 'websearch-index' (WebSearch-indexed verbatim text), a non-standard recovery method not mapped to any of the template panel's 3 buckets (wayback/mirror/altsource). investigator.droppedReason: Proxy egress policy blocked all non-platform.claude.com HTTPS connections. All 7 recorded rows are from Anthropic developer platform (platform.claude.com). Proxy blocked all external HTTPS. 6 rows recovered via websearch-index (non-standard ladder rung). Seeds federalreserve.gov, nvidianews.nvidia.com, theedgemalaysia.com, thestar.com.my and others all blocked.

Proxy blocked all non-GitHub HTTPS. All 5 recorded rows from GitHub-hosted content (EpicGames/lore, NVIDIA/game-agent-sdk), dated June 2026. July 6-13 gamedev stories (UE5.8 MCP hands-on, 80.lv water simulation, Fab free content) all inaccessible.
